etymology.description: 木(木, "tree") + 丮(丮, "to hold") = a kneeling person planting a sapling into soil (土) -> planting -> art
etymology.interpretation: The character 埶 (yì, "art") is an ideogrammic compound that originally depicted a person planting a sapling, symbolizing cultivation or nurturing skills, which is conceptually linked to the idea of "art." It visually combines the concepts of a tree (木) and the action of holding (丮), representing the planting process.
